subject: history
title: 18N.2.BP.TZ0.12
question_html: “Peacemaking had limited success in the early modern period.” With reference to two examples, to what extent do you agree with this statement?
solution_html: Candidates will consider the merits or otherwise of the statement that peacemaking had limited success in the early modern period. The two examples may or may not be from the same region and they may or may not have been contemporaneous with each other. Long-term effects, where they existed, may extend beyond 1750, but they must be clearly linked to peacemaking efforts that occurred within the timeframe. A comparative approach may or may not be used. Candidates may refer to the success or otherwise of peacemaking in ending conflicts, securing lasting peace, resolving the causes of conflict or whether the peace, ultimately, exacerbated tensions. While other, relevant, factors may be referred to, the bulk of the response will remain on the issue raised in the question. Candidates may agree, partly agree or disagree with the statement.
